items.title: Spec references obsolete clean_columnsAndHeaders.Notebook (renamed to bronze-to-silver)
items.description: Spec §§ Data Transformations, Current State Assessment, and Naming Conventions still reference `clean_columnsAndHeaders.Notebook` — on disk the cleaning notebook is `bronze-to-silver.Notebook` (no archive entry of the old name).

items.title: Spec lists semantic_model_oeminsightbi; active model is OEMInsightBI_v2
items.description: Spec §§ Technical Architecture and Semantic Model & Reporting reference `semantic_model_oeminsightbi`; the active model on disk is `OEMInsightBI_v2.SemanticModel` and the old name lives only under `fabric/archive/`.

items.title: Spec names report.Report; active artifact is report2.Report
items.description: Spec §§ Semantic Model & Reporting and Dependencies still reference `report.Report` — on disk only `fabric/report2.Report` exists; the original is archived.

items.title: Spec locates Azure SQL setup scripts in azure/; actual path is secure/ (gitignored)
items.description: Spec §§ Data Architecture and Security & Access list `azure/user_creation.sql` and `azure/grant_permissions.sql` — actual paths are under `secure/` (gitignored per project convention for credential-bearing scripts).
source_anchors: spec_v1.md § Data Architecture / Azure SQL Database (lines 112, 156-160)

items.title: Inconsistent 'DQ' vs 'data quality' terminology across spec sections
items.description: Multiple spec sections alternate between 'DQ' and 'data quality' (e.g., 'DQ checks' in § Next Steps vs 'data quality checks' in § Development Workflow) without an abbreviation introduction.

items.title: 'Quality observability tables' vs 'data quality observability tables' within § Current State Assessment
items.description: Spec § Current State Assessment alternates between 'Data quality observability tables' (Gold layer) and 'Quality observability tables' (Semantic Model subsection) for the same feature.
